ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Update - New Products & Offers Inside
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Here’s your weekly update on our latest products and exclusive offers just for you.

1. New Arrival: Ultra‑Comfort Chair – 20% off this week only.
2. Top Rated: Smart LED Lamp – buy 1 get 1 free.
3. Customer Spotlight: See how our users are transforming their spaces.

To claim these deals, visit <URL> and use code WEEKLY20.

Thank you for being part of our community!

Best regards,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Account Suspended - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet account has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To avoid permanent suspension, you must verify your identity within 24 hours.

Please click on the link below to confirm your details:
<URL>

Failure to act will result in loss of access to your funds.

Regards,
Wallet Support Team
